feed.title: dajhub - cinnamon
feed.subtitle: Welcome to my blog where, as a Linux enthusiast, I share my tips with you. I hope you find something that is useful.

entry.title: Fedora: Minimal Cinnamon Desktop Install
entry.summary: Fedora offers a specific spin for Cinnamon Desktop but if you are looking for a more minimal install which doesn't include, for example, dnfdragora, LibrOffice, HexChat, Pidgin, Thunderbird, Transmission, Rhythmbox, XawTV Television Viewer, etc., then this post might be of interest.
